THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, AHMAD SPECK CAB COMPANY NO APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
